allow: PowerShell($f = Get-Item "C:\\Users\\Reinaldo Santana\\Documents\\UNIP\\Teste otica\\Smooth_D_product_animation_T.mp4"; "Size MB: " + [math]::Round\($f.Length/1MB,2\); try { $v=\(Get-Command ffmpeg -ErrorAction Stop\).Source; "ffmpeg: $v" } catch { "ffmpeg: NOT FOUND" })
